scope: Promote B22 BlockBenchmark semantic evidence into the Phase 9 experiment matrix
Add machine-checkable vmos-experiment-report evidence for M6
Add golden trace tying M6 to the underlying semantic command, event, ViewV1, and invariant
Validate osctl experiment report JSON and osctl block-benchmark stable ViewV1 evidence
Keep M6 as host-validation semantic benchmark evidence, not calibrated virtio-blk or disk scheduler performance
no_goals: adapter-local disk state as semantic truth

implemented_contract_clauses.clause: experiment evidence references block-benchmark:20132@1 by exact kind/id/generation
BlockBenchmark references block backend, block device, range, read path, write path, request queue, and DMA buffer through historical exact-generation edges
osctl exposes stable block-benchmark ViewV1 and experiment report JSON
checkpoint report records scope, no-goals, validation, evidence, and next checkpoint

findings_fixed: M6 does not create a parallel disk benchmark truth source; it references existing B22 BlockBenchmark evidence
Experiment report uses vmos-experiment-report schema rather than vmos-benchmark-report
osctl command-result negative evidence remains visible for stale read path and latency-budget cases
No Rust runtime, filesystem adapter, virtio, or substrate path changed for M6
bad_smells_checked: No CLI output string is treated as semantic truth
No calibrated target disk IOPS claim is made
No third-party crate or adapter internal state appears in the experiment schema
residual_notes: M7 owns disk recovery time experiment evidence
A future target hardware benchmark can replace the measurement source while preserving the same experiment report shape

residual_gaps: M7 disk recovery time experiment remains
M6 is host-validation semantic harness evidence, not calibrated target hardware disk IOPS
